violations.description: CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Seafood noted not removed from vacuum sealed bag completely during thawing.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler door handle under the espresso machine noted not in good repair.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In-use utensil noted as being constructed without a handle. All in-use utensils must be constructed with a handle and be stored so the handle does not contact the food.
